axisId.description: Id of the radius axis to render. If not provided, it will use the first defined radius axis.

className.description: A CSS class name applied to the root element.

disableLine.description: If true, the axis line is not rendered.

disableTicks.description: If true, the ticks are not rendered.

position.description: The posiiton of the axis in polar coordinates. It can be 'start', 'end', or a specific angle in degrees.

tickLabelPosition.description: Set the position of the tick labels relative to the axis line. The before/after is defined based on clockwise direction.

tickPosition.description: Set the position of the tick relative to the axis line. The before/after is defined based on clockwise direction.

tickSize.description: The size (in pixels) of the tick marks.
